title: osmanthus marginatus
intro: Osmanthus marginatus, also known as the white tea olive or sweet osmanthus, is a flowering plant native to China and Japan. It is traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, Osmanthus marginatus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression.
